text: Amazon SageMaker s cnie @ st ¢ Fully Managed Machine Learning (ML) Service e Fetch, Clean, Prepare, Train, Evaluate, Deploy, Monitor/Collect * Sage Maker Studio - Build, train, debug and monitor models - IDE for ML lifecycle * Sagemaker Domain - EFS Volume, Users, Apps, Policies, VPCs ... isolation e Containers - Docker containers deployed to ML EC2 instance - ML environments (OS, Libs, Tooling) * Hosting - Deploy endpoints for your models * Sagemaker has no cost - the resources it creates do.... (Complex pricing)
